title: cyclosorus × tabaquitensis
intro: Cyclosorus × tabaquitensis is a hybrid species of fern, specifically a type of fern that belongs to the genus Cyclosorus. It is native to the Philippines and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Traditional preparations include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves, which are used to create herbal remedies for the mentioned health benefits.
